  Additionally, I'll verify if
  [38;5;183mr8_go/src/utils/descriptor.go[39m exists,
  as it's a dependency for the
  [38;5;183mToSourceString[39m method.

[38;5;59m╭───────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFolder[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/utils[39m     [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m Listed 68 item(s).                [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰───────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ [39mI've noted that
  [38;5;183mutils.DescriptorToJavaType[39m is used in
  [38;5;183mdex_string.go[39m, so I'll examine
  [38;5;183mr8_go/src/utils/descriptor_utils.go[39m to
  confirm its implementation.

[38;5;59m╭───────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/utils/desc[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰───────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m I've confirmed that
  [38;5;183mutils.DescriptorToJavaType[39m is correctly
  implemented and used. I'll now refactor
  [38;5;183mr8_go/src/dex/dex_string.go[39m by
  splitting it into separate files for
  [38;5;183mDexString[39m, [38;5;183mDexType[39m, [38;5;183mDexProto[39m,
  [38;5;183mDexMethod[39m, [38;5;183mDexField[39m, and
  [38;5;183mDexItemFactory[39m. I'll begin by
  extracting [38;5;183mDexType[39m into its own file,
  ensuring that all related methods and
  dependencies are correctly handled
  within the [38;5;183mdex[39m package.
[38;5;59m╭───────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mWriteFile[0m [38;5;103mWriting to r8_go/sr[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m... first 257 lines hidden ...[39m    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m258[39m         [38;5;153mpanic[39m([38;5;223m"AddSuffix only[39m [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     [38;5;223mvalid for class types"[39m)       [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m259[39m     }                         [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m260[39m     d :=                      [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     t.[38;5;153mToDescriptorString[39m()        [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m261[39m     newDescriptor :=          [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     d[:[38;5;153mlen[39m(d)[38;5;151m-1[39m] + suffix + [38;5;223m";"[39m   [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m262[39m     [38;5;153mreturn[39m                    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     factory.CreateType(factory.Cr [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     eateString(newDescriptor))    [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m263[39m }                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m264[39m                               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m265[39m [38;5;153mfunc[39m (t *DexType)             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     AddSuffixId(index [38;5;153mint[39m,        [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m269[39m     [38;5;153mif[39m [38;5;153mindex[39m < [38;5;151m0[39m {            [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m     t.AddSuffix(fmt.Sprintf([38;5;223m"$%d"[39m [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m     , index), factory)            [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m273[39m }                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m274[39m                               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m275[39m [38;5;153mfunc[39m (t *DexType)             [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m286[39m                               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m287[39m [38;5;153mfunc[39m (t *DexType) GetName()   [38;5;59m│[39m
